one_liner: Michigan mineral estate (>1.3M acres) with Copperwood production royalty option atop modest lease income; GAAP book misstates fair value.
key_assumptions: Mineral lease run-rate ~$365K/yr capitalized in operating component proof
Copperwood royalty P=35% at spot copper (~$6.54/lb vs SSI $4/lb reference)
GAAP book ~$12.70/sh; economic floor ~$21/sh not GAAP book
Price ~$55 embeds much of the Copperwood option
open_questions: Does management achieve cash-flow positive operations from 2026 as stated at 2025 shareholder meeting?
Highland Copper Copperwood production timing and royalty start date
Secondary lessee on 667K-acre June 2024 expansion package
